Sagrada Família
Antoni Gaudí\'s masterwork — under continuous construction since 1882. A UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1984. The 18 towers represent the Twelve Apostles, the four Evangelists, the Virgin Mary, and Jesus Christ. Expected completion: 2026.
